calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Roberto G. Ripamonti, Esq. appeared for plaintiff LF George Jewelry Corp.
Salesperson Serena Pang and Owner George Lam, witness for plaintiff, were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Kevin Dickson.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Famous Entertainment Group, LLC, was filed today, October 27, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant Kevin Dickson on July 2, 2009. Amended Default was entered on October 14, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 25, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff LF George Jewelry Corp., and against the Defaulted Defendant Kevin Dickson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $31,454.15.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,990.29.
Costs - $544.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $34,988.44.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Continued To Nov-30-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-13-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
